data.settleTest: A single-source, consistent-scope table of total installed IT load (colo + self-operated) for all CE-7 countries — e.g., a PMR or Arizton pan-European installed-IT-load series — that lets you compute per-country shares on one denominator. This exists as a purchasable dataset and settles whether colo-based shares misstate the country mix today.

proposedCorrection.rationale: Colo-only denominator overstates Germany; the BMWK installed-IT-load cross-check already puts DE at ~0.42, so recentering to ~0.46 splits the two scope methods rather than anchoring on colo-only 0.50.

researchQueries.query: PMR or Arizton pan-European total installed IT load (colo + enterprise/self-operated) by country for Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland, Poland, Czechia, Austria 2025
BMWK 2,700 MW German installed IT power vs CE-7 total installed IT load — does Germany's installed-load share fall within 3pp of its colo-based 0.50 share
